creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(1) doesn't make sense to me as cy@ is working on replacing base Heimdal with an up-to-date MIT Kerberos, so putting effort into base Heimdal would be wasteful.

i would be happy to have (2), an option to build PostgreSQL with MIT Kerberos from ports in the mean time, similar to how security/openssh-portable and other Kerberos consumers work.

(it's been about 9 months since i filed this PR so i haven't checked if this problem is still current.)
